response.justification: Bogdan has an impressive technical background with over 15 years of software engineering experience and strong expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and mobile platforms. However, his career trajectory has been strictly as an Individual Contributor (Senior/Staff Engineer). He lacks the required 2+ years of formal people management experience, making him unsuitable for a Level II Manager role focused on full-time people leadership, 1-on-1s, and performance evaluations.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience, easily exceeding the 8-year requirement.
Extensive experience building developer tools, testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and CI/CD pipelines.
Direct hands-on experience with mobile platform ecosystems, having developed and maintained successful iOS and Apple TV applications.
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience in formal people management, direct reports, or conducting performance reviews.
Lacks experience leading organizational change or managing cross-team alignment at a leadership level.
Career focus is heavily skewed toward Individual Contributor (IC) responsibilities rather than engineering management.
